title: aster jacksonii
intro: Aster jacksonii, also known as the prairie aster, is a flowering plant species native to the Great Plains of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Aster jacksonii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
